briefdescription.para: Get amount of space dedicated for managing each buffer state.

detaileddescription.para: User buffer provided during the initialization is split into chunks and each chunk has overhead. This overhead can be used to calculate actual space used for UART data.

briefdescription.para: Reset state of the helper instance.

detaileddescription.para: Helper can be reset after RX abort to discard all received data and bring the helper to its initial state.
Function shall be called from UART_RX_RDY context.

parameterdescription.para: Buffer received in the UART driver event.
Length received in the UART driver event.

detaileddescription.para: Returned pointer shall be provided to uart_rx_buf_rsp or uart_rx_enable. If null is returned that indicates that there are no available buffers since all buffers are used by the driver or contain not consumed data.

simplesect.para: Pointer to the next RX buffer or null if no buffer available.

briefdescription.para: Indicate that buffer is no longer used by the UART driver.

detaileddescription.para: Function shall be called on UART_RX_BUF_RELEASED event.

parameterdescription.para: Buffer pointer received in the UART driver event.

detaileddescription.para: Helper module works in the zero copy mode. It provides a pointer to the buffer that was directly used by the UART driver. Since received data is spread across multiple buffers there is no possibility to read all data at once. It can only be consumed in chunks. After data is processed, uart_async_rx_data_consume is used to indicate that data is consumed.

parameterdescription.para: Location where address to the buffer is written. Untouched if no data to claim.

simplesect.para: Amount valid of data in the data buffer. 0 is returned when there is no data.

parameterdescription.para: Amount of data to consume. It must be less or equal than amount of claimed data.
If there are free buffers in the pool after data got consumed.
If there are no free buffers.

briefdescription.para: Helper module for receiving using UART Asynchronous API.
